cfg.rare_fish_catch_rate.name: Rare Fish Catch Rate
cfg.rare_fish_catch_rate.desc:
How often you reel in rare fish - the gold fish, gold-tier salmon, gold-tier sturgeon, and gold-tier crucian. Percentages assume the best rod, gem lure, distance 3, and daytime fishing; other rods or spots will feel similar.

• Vanilla - about 1 rare in 20 casts (around 5%, the default game rate).
• Slightly Increased - about 1 in 9 casts (around 11%).
• Increased - about 1 in 5 casts (around 20%).
• Greatly Increased - about 1 in 3 casts (around 33%).
• Very Common - about every other cast (around 50%).
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
